title: CommonsV2 Group B: LRU cache + grace period timer

log.context: CommonsV2 Group B: LRU cache + grace period timer

All done. Here is a summary of what was changed:

**Fix 1 — LRU eviction for chunkCache** (`/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/map/chunk.ts`):
- Added `MAX_CACHE_SIZE = 16` and a `cacheOrder: string[]` array to track access order.
- `getChunk` now moves a hit key to the end of `cacheOrder` (most-recently-used) and, on a miss, evicts the oldest entry when the cache exceeds 16 entries. This bounds memory use regardless of how many chunks a player visits.
